en.legal.privacy.meta.title: Privacy Policy — Circuit Diagram Maker
en.legal.privacy.meta.description: Read the privacy policy for Circuit Diagram Maker. Learn how we handle your data, what information we collect, and your rights under GDPR and CCPA.
en.legal.privacy.hero.title: Privacy Policy
en.legal.privacy.s1.title: 1. Introduction
en.legal.privacy.s1.p1: This privacy policy explains how Circuit Diagram Maker ("we", "us", "our") collects, uses, and protects information when you use our free, browser-based circuit diagram maker at circuit-diagram.org. We are committed to protecting your privacy and being transparent about our data practices.
en.legal.privacy.s2.title: 2. Information We Collect
en.legal.privacy.s2.p1: Circuit Diagram Maker is designed with privacy-first principles. Here's what we do and don't collect:
en.legal.privacy.s2.l1.title: Circuit diagrams and designs:
en.legal.privacy.s2.l1.desc: All diagrams you create in the circuit diagram maker are stored exclusively in your browser's local storage. We never upload, access, or store your circuit schematics on our servers.
en.legal.privacy.s2.l2.title: Analytics data:
en.legal.privacy.s2.l2.desc: We use privacy-respecting analytics to understand how users interact with our circuit diagram maker. This includes page views, session duration, and general geographic region (country-level). No personally identifiable information is collected.
en.legal.privacy.s2.l3.title: Contact form data:
en.legal.privacy.s2.l3.desc: If you submit our contact form, we collect your name, email address, and message content solely to respond to your inquiry.
en.legal.privacy.s3.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
en.legal.privacy.s3.p1: Any data collected is used exclusively to:
en.legal.privacy.s3.l1: Improve the performance and usability of Circuit Diagram Maker
en.legal.privacy.s3.l2: Monitor website uptime, error rates, and page load speeds
en.legal.privacy.s3.l3: Respond to support inquiries submitted through our contact form
en.legal.privacy.s3.l4: Understand which features of the circuit diagram maker are most used to guide development priorities
en.legal.privacy.s4.title: 4. Cookies & Local Storage
en.legal.privacy.s4.p1: Circuit Diagram Maker uses browser local storage to save your circuit diagrams, editor preferences, and session state. This data remains entirely on your device and is never transmitted to our servers. We may use essential cookies for basic analytics functionality.
en.legal.privacy.s5.title: 5. Third-Party Services
en.legal.privacy.s5.p1: We use the following third-party services:
en.legal.privacy.s5.l1.title: Google Fonts:
en.legal.privacy.s5.l1.desc: We load the Inter and JetBrains Mono typefaces from Google's CDN. Google's privacy policy applies to font loading requests.
en.legal.privacy.s5.l2.title: Analytics:
en.legal.privacy.s5.l2.desc: We use privacy-respecting analytics tools that do not use cookies and comply with GDPR without requiring user consent.
en.legal.privacy.s5.p2: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with any third parties for marketing purposes.
en.legal.privacy.s6.title: 6. Data Security
en.legal.privacy.s6.p1: Our website is served over HTTPS to ensure encrypted data transmission. Since circuit diagrams are stored locally in your browser, your designs are never exposed to network-level security risks. We follow industry best practices for securing our web infrastructure.
en.legal.privacy.s7.title: 7. Your Rights (GDPR & CCPA)
en.legal.privacy.s7.p1: If you are located in the European Economic Area, United Kingdom, or California, you have the right to:
en.legal.privacy.s7.l1: Access any personal data we hold about you
en.legal.privacy.s7.l2: Request deletion of your personal data
en.legal.privacy.s7.l3: Object to processing of your personal data
en.legal.privacy.s7.l4: Request portability of your personal data
en.legal.privacy.s7.p2: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at
en.legal.privacy.s8.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
en.legal.privacy.s8.p1: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. When we make material changes, we will update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. We encourage you to review this privacy policy periodically to stay informed about how Circuit Diagram Maker protects your information.
en.legal.terms.meta.title: Terms of Service — Circuit Diagram Maker
en.legal.terms.meta.description: Read the terms of service for Circuit Diagram Maker. Understand the usage license, intellectual property rights, and disclaimers for our free circuit diagram tool.
en.legal.terms.hero.title: Terms of Service
en.legal.terms.s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
en.legal.terms.s1.p1: By accessing and using Circuit Diagram Maker at circuit-diagram.org, you accept and agree to be bound by these terms of service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our circuit diagram maker. These terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access the service.
en.legal.terms.s2.title: 2. Use License
en.legal.terms.s2.p1: Circuit Diagram Maker grants you a non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use the circuit diagram editor for personal and commercial purposes. You may:
en.legal.terms.s2.l1: Create unlimited circuit diagrams using the editor
en.legal.terms.s2.l2: Export diagrams in SVG, PNG, and JSON formats
en.legal.terms.s2.l3: Use exported circuit diagrams in academic papers, technical documentation, presentations, and publications
en.legal.terms.s2.l4: Share exported files with colleagues, students, and collaborators
en.legal.terms.s3.title: 3. Restrictions
en.legal.terms.s3.p1: When using Circuit Diagram Maker, you agree not to:
en.legal.terms.s3.l1: Attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, or extract the source code of the circuit diagram maker
en.legal.terms.s3.l2: Use automated tools to scrape, crawl, or extract data from the website
en.legal.terms.s3.l3: Misrepresent Circuit Diagram Maker or its features in any public communication
en.legal.terms.s3.l4: Use the service for any unlawful purpose or to create harmful or misleading content
en.legal.terms.s4.title: 4. Intellectual Property
en.legal.terms.s4.p1: The Circuit Diagram Maker software, including its design, code, graphics, icons, and electronic symbol library, is the intellectual property of Circuit Diagram Maker and is protected by applicable copyright laws. The circuit diagrams you create are yours — you retain full ownership and copyright of all designs you produce using our tool.
en.legal.terms.s5.title: 5. Disclaimer of Warranties
en.legal.terms.s5.p1: Circuit Diagram Maker is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not warrant that the circuit diagram maker will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of viruses or other harmful components. Circuit diagrams created with this tool are for reference purposes — always verify critical circuits with proper simulation and testing before physical implementation.
en.legal.terms.s6.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
en.legal.terms.s6.p1: In no event shall Circuit Diagram Maker, its directors, employees, partners, or suppliers be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the circuit diagram maker, including but not limited to errors in circuit designs, data loss, or inability to access the service.
en.legal.terms.s7.title: 7. Governing Law
en.legal.terms.s7.p1: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws, without regard to conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising from the use of Circuit Diagram Maker shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with applicable arbitration rules.
en.legal.terms.s8.title: 8. Contact Information
en.legal.terms.s8.p1: If you have any questions about these terms of service, please contact us at
